positive: Minimalist geometric celestial map: a stylized depiction of the zodiac constellations emerging from a crescent moon and starry nebula. The design features clean, thick white lines forming recognizable star patterns (e.g., Orion, Taurus) against a deep midnight blue, gradient watercolor wash background. Incorporate abstract, stylized cosmic elements like swirling pastel nebulae (lavender, pale gold, cyan) and glowing abstract orrery components. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, forming a striking, badge-like silhouette. Style should be modern botanical/scientific illustration meets contemporary linework. Ideal for apparel printing, high contrast, crisp lines, and clean negative space.
